title: War Decimated Iran’s Leadership and Pushed Up a New Generation
summary_full: Since the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, authority has shifted to the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps. Younger military leaders have come to the fore.
summary_public: Since the killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, authority has shifted to the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps. Younger military leaders have come to the fore.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: authority has shifted to the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps.
